Transponder.title: Transponder
Transponder.description: Required to enable the construction of most structures and to be detected by other ships and facilities. Contains a backup battery, limited to 90w of connected power that automatically activates whenever its primary circuit loses power.

CommConsole.title: Comms console
CommConsole.description: Required for communication with other ships and facilities.

SmallThruster.title: Small thruster
SmallThruster.description: Provides a small amount of thrust when activated.

MediumThruster.title: Medium thruster
MediumThruster.description: Provides a moderate amount of thrust when activated.

LargeThruster.title: Large thruster
LargeThruster.description: Provides a large amount of thrust when activated.

Aeroponics.title: Aeroponics
Aeroponics.description: A place to grow plants and vegetables. Anything growing here will start to rot if this is not powered.
